studio_profile.description:
Deckbuilding of Slay the Spire meets the combat of Xcom. AlcheMice is a video game that combines the roguelike and deckbuilder genres into a unique experience of strategy and new gameplay mechanics􁨊
Set in 16th-century Granada, players will embody Tycoh, an alchemist mouse on a mission to 􁧨nd the legendary Al-Jabeer's alchemy notebook􁨊 This notebook is crucial for crafting the philosopher's stone, the only hope to save his family from a
terrible fever􁨊

business.business_model: venta directa en plataforma como steam
